meaning: adj.起涟漪的,潺潺流水般声音的
examples: Suddenly a clear rippling little sound broke out near her and she turned around.
The grass is rippling in the breeze.
Tolerance simply has a rippling effect that makes people happier.
The pain from the housing downturn is rippling into many corners of the economy, including software.
Mr. Booker said tension has been rippling through the local community because of competition for the jobs.
